content_body:
We've been here a week and it feels like we just got here. It went by way too fast. We went kayaking on the Toccoa River, rented a pontoon boat on Lake Blue Ridge, hiked Blood Mountain at Vogel State Park, ate at the Toccoa Riverside Restaurant, and while the girls did their shopping in downtown Blue Ridge, I caught up on some reading on the porch overlooking the mountains. One of the best parts of the week was coming back to the cabin every night and enjoying everything it has to offer. You all did a fabulous job making a vacation home and thank you so much for sharing it with us.
FL
title: Time Flies by in the North Georgia Mountains!
